career.title: AI Strategy Consultant
career.pivot_context: Transitioning from software engineering management to AI-driven strategy and business development

profile_summary: 15+ years in software engineering and enterprise delivery
Formerly at Dassault Systèmes and Cognizant
Delivered for Apple, Boeing, Red Bull Racing, and ExxonMobil

hero_section.headline: Helping businesses deploy AI effectively, securely, and at scale
hero_section.body: Building forecasting systems, GenAI applications, intelligent search, and production-grade AI platforms for real-world business environments.

features.title: Problem definition
features.subtext: Translate ambiguous business needs into actionable AI roadmaps.

features.title: Production AI Delivery
features.subtext: From experimentation and modeling to MLOps and deployment.

features.title: Decision Intelligence
features.subtext: Forecasting, optimization, recommendations, and explainable AI systems.

cta.subtext: Strategy consulting · ML development · GenAI systems · MLOps

business_problems.title: Forecasting and Trend Prediction
business_problems.subtext: How is the market evolving, and what will happen next?

business_problems.title: Intelligent search and document understanding
business_problems.subtext: How do we extract reliable insight from large document repositories?

business_problems.title: Recommendation and personalisation
business_problems.subtext: What products, actions, or content should be surfaced next?

business_problems.title: AI risk and explainability
business_problems.subtext: Can we trust this model's recommendations in high-stakes scenarios?

summary_hints: Software engineering manager with 15+ years delivering high-impact projects for clients such as Apple, Red Bull Racing, and Boeing
Pivoting into AI-driven strategy and business development
Blends advanced technical expertise in GenAI, machine learning, and MLOps with sharp business acumen
Translates complex domain needs into actionable AI projects
Committed to driving growth through strategic partnerships, client engagement, and identifying potential areas for AI intervention
Currently completing Advanced Management Program in Business Analytics at ISB and Post Graduate Program in Data Science at UT Austin

work_experience.title: SIMULIA R&D Software Engineering Manager
bullets: Bolstered the 45+ year legacy of Abaqus/CAE as an industry-leading simulation software by pioneering features that integrate modern data science with traditional CAE
Orchestrated end-to-end product development lifecycles through coordination with global engineering teams to ensure on-time delivery, high product quality, and customer satisfaction
Translated complex data pipeline automation requirements to lead the development of a suite of Python libraries and APIs, reducing manual data handling by 100%
Engineered scalable high-performance algorithms to process millions of data points, transforming raw simulation outputs into precise, actionable engineering metrics
Won multiple awards for technical brilliance (individual contributor) and project delivery (team)
Mentored 10+ junior developers and managed 20+ monthly customer-request fixes

education.degree: Advanced Management Program in Business Analytics
Post Graduate Program in Data Science & Business Analytics

projects.name: Spot the Fake — Fraudulent Website Detection
projects.description: Multi-stage classification system to detect fraudulent websites using metadata triage and AI-powered content analysis. 3rd place in National Level Hackathon.
highlights: Achieved 0.9 recall with a hybrid model: fine-tuned Mistral-7B (LoRA) for HTML analysis, Siamese networks for UI similarity, and Random Forest classifier
Combined instant metadata flagging (WHOIS, SSL, URL heuristics) with in-depth LLM analysis for multi-stage detection
Designed interactive Flask + React.js dashboard highlighting risky webpage elements with LLM-generated tags (scam, phishing, clone)

projects.name: Shopping Cart Recommendation System
projects.description: Personalized recommendation engine to suggest frequently forgotten items in shopping carts. Kaggle Competition Winner — #1 out of 20 teams.
highlights: Secured #1 ranking with a winning recall@5 score of 0.25 on the Kaggle benchmark dataset
Engineered item-centric signals (SKU co-occurrence, seasonality) and user-centric behaviors (temporal purchase history, segmentation)
Built for mobile platform customer experience improvement

projects.name: Bullet Train Passenger Experience Prediction
projects.description: Supervised learning model to identify key parameters driving passenger travel experience on a bullet train. Hackathon winner.
highlights: Won class-level hackathon with top classification accuracy of 95.7% among 40 participants
Built ensemble of XGBoost models with targeted feature engineering and LightGBM-based feature selection

projects.name: End-to-End Stock Forecasting & MLOps Platform
projects.description: Full MLOps-governed stock forecasting platform with experiment tracking, drift monitoring, and automated retraining.
highlights: Defined product vision and success metrics aligning technical targets (MAPE <=10%, RMSE <=20%) with business goals for >=10% portfolio return improvement
Implemented comprehensive MLOps governance with MLflow for model registry and experiment tracking
Built drift monitoring system that triggers automated retraining when deviations exceed 10%; maintained data quality through outlier detection and cleaning

projects.name: Cosmetic Store Chatbot with Knowledge Graphs (Graph-RAG)
projects.description: Domain-specific chatbot using Graph-RAG to deliver personalized cosmetic product recommendations with reduced hallucinations.
highlights: Designed product ontology in Neo4j modeling relationships between products, categories, ingredients, and user profiles
Implemented Graph-RAG with LangChain for factually correct, context-aware answers; reduced LLM hallucinations
Enabled personalized recommendations based on user requirements, brand preferences, skin type, and allergen sensitivities

projects.name: Boeing — Data Pipelines for Engineering Workflows
projects.description: Automated integration of siloed Finite Element Analysis (FEA) data into machine learning systems at Boeing.
highlights: Reduced data extraction latency by ~90%, eliminating manual workflows
Enabled engineering teams to focus on high-value analysis by automating repetitive data organization

projects.name: Red Bull Racing — High Performance Data Architecture
projects.description: Architectural redesign of stress data storage and aggregation pipeline for Red Bull Racing F1 team.
highlights: Achieved 10% reduction in output database file size by storing aggregated stress data instead of raw results
Drove ~25% efficiency improvement in downstream analytics by eliminating runtime aggregation overhead

projects.name: Apple — Strategic Prioritization & Roadmap Management
projects.description: Managed competing product priorities to deliver a business-critical animation engine for Apple.
highlights: Reallocated engineering resources to deliver animation engine for Apple while preserving internal R&D goals
Achieved seamless delivery through cross-functional collaboration across QA, UX, and Documentation teams

projects.name: Agentic Resume Screener
projects.description: Multi-agent pipeline using CrewAI to automate resume screening and candidate shortlisting.
highlights: Parser Agent: Extracts structured data from resumes (PDF)
Matcher Agent: Aligns resume skills with job descriptions using MiniLM embeddings
Feedback Agent: Generates interpretability tags and match verdicts
RAG Enricher: Augments resume context using FAISS retrievers
CrewAI Orchestration: Coordinates agents for end-to-end screening
Achieved a match score similar to LinkedIn match details, thus providing me valuable feedback when on jobs where the match score was not shown

freelance.tagline: AI strategy and engineering, from first principles to production

services.title: AI strategy & roadmapping
services.description: Translate business problems into AI project scopes, define KPIs, and build implementation roadmaps that non-technical stakeholders can act on.

services.title: ML model development
services.description: End-to-end model building — from EDA and feature engineering through training, evaluation, and deployment-ready packaging.

services.title: GenAI & RAG systems
services.description: LLM-powered applications using RAG, knowledge graphs, and agentic workflows. Reduced hallucinations, domain-specific grounding.

services.title: MLOps & data pipelines
services.description: Production ML governance: experiment tracking, model registry, drift monitoring, CI/CD pipelines, and automated retraining.

signals.label: Award
signals.detail: Multiple Dassault Systèmes awards for technical brilliance

chatbot_system_prompt: You are a personal assistant for Krishnan CS. Answer questions about his experience, skills, projects, education, and career goals based only on the profile data provided. Be concise and professional. If someone asks about anything unrelated to Krishnan — such as general coding help, trivia, or other topics — politely decline and redirect the conversation back to questions about him.

achievements: Competitive sudoku and pencil puzzle solver
Multiple awards for technical brilliance and project delivery at Dassault Systemes
